title: La tienda del Pueblo Clothing Donations
description: It’s our weekly community clothing swap. Neighbors drop off gently used clothes and leave with something new-to-them for themselves or their kids. It’s a sustainable way to refresh your wardrobe while keeping perfectly good clothing out of landfills. That’s why we ask everyone to bring clean, gently used items you’d be happy to wear yourself. […]

title: Tech Trends Unleashed: Explore, Engage, Excel in Queens!
address: 75-20 Astoria Blvd S Suite 140, East Elmhurst, NY 11370, USA
description: Ideal for: Owners and decision-makers of Queens and Long Island based small to medium-sized businesses, typically with 10 to 500 employees, across industries like finance, construction, logistics, retail, hospitality, and non-profits. title: Creative Aging: Crafts for Older Adults Series (in Spanish)
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Manualidades para Personas Mayores (en español) English: Join us for a welcoming and creative series of workshops designed for Latinx older adults to explore craft, memory, and community. Through hands-on activities such as stitching, embroidery, sashiko, weaving, and painting, participants will engage in artistic practices that nurture self-expression, reflection, and connection with others. title: What’s Your Story: Dino Series
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: QPL invites children to kick off Summer Reading with our Dino Series! Week 1: Create a magnetic dino masterpiece to take home while discovering fun facts about your favorite prehistoric creatures! title: QPL Homework Help – Jackson Heights
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Looking for extra support with schoolwork? QPL Homework Help is here for students in grades 1–5! This drop-in-only program offers personalized assistance with homework and assignments, all provided by our dedicated staff and friendly volunteers. No enrollment required—just stop by and get the help you need to excel in your studies. Whether it’s math, reading, […]

title: Queens Distance Runners: Jackson Heights Community Run @ Queensboro
description: The Meetup is 6:00PM opposite The Queensboro. We wait until 6:05PM, take our Weekly Photo at the mural, then head off for our beautiful 5K route. Route: Down 34th Avenue to 69th, return and head all the way to PS 149 for 2 loops, returning all the way back on 34th ending at Travers Park […]

title: Spring Zumba with Leo
description: FREE ZUMBA this Spring at the garden! title: Terraza Big Band | Symphonic Journeys
description: The Terraza Big Band, an 18-piece ensemble from Queens, NY, performs Grammy-nominated jazz compositions led by Michael Thomas and Edward Perez. Their dynamic music captivates with fresh, innovative ideas. 7:00PM to 7:45PM (Open Rehearsal); 8:00PM to 9:00PM(Concert) Admission: $20 COVER Featuring: Trumpets: Sam Hoyt; Alejandro Berti; Dave Neves; Jonathan Saraga. title: Monday Improv Jam
description: An improv jam is an open, low-pressure playground where performers of all experience levels jump on stage, get mixed into teams, and create scenes on the spot. Whether it’s your first time or your hundredth show, you’ll get a chance to play, experiment, and connect with other improvisers in a supportive, fun environment.
